MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay: Clerk K. Liu; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mosser Companies is present. Represented by Ezequiel Cazarez.
Attorney Daniel Stern appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Alma D. Garcis and Jose Sanchez are present.
Attorney Jessica Yeh representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Jan. 14, 2013 remain on calendar. (501/JPT)
